nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Admin-gated bid entry for the LUXI live page. Mary watches a live stream, sees a comment, enters the bid here. Auto-registers the bidder as a tier_0 record on first sighting (later upgrades to tier_1/2/3 happen when phone/social/Stripe verifications land).
